<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Wateros (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-tiū]][[de:Wasser-Büffel]][[hak:Kui-chhiú]][[ja:癸丑]][[ko:계축]][[vi:Quý Sửu]][[za:Gveiqcouj]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-thiú]][[zh-yue:癸丑]][[zh:癸丑]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Wateros (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-tiū]][[de:Wasser-Büffel]][[hak:Kui-chhiú]][[ja:癸丑]][[ko:계축]][[vi:Quý Sửu]][[za:Gveiqcouj]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-thiú]][[zh-yue:癸丑]][[zh:癸丑]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Wateros (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-tiū]][[de:Wasser-Büffel]][[hak:Kui-chhiú]][[ja:癸丑]][[ko:계축]][[vi:Quý Sửu]][[za:Gveiqcouj]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-thiú]][[zh-yue:癸丑]][[zh:癸丑]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Ox|kanji=癸丑|romaji=mizunoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=guǐchǒu|w=kuei-ch'ou|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gwai2 chau2|j=gwai2 chau2|ci=kʷɐi tsʰɐu̯|mc=kjwɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Water Ox also known as  Kinoe-Ushi''' (癸丑, みずのとうし, きすいのうし, きちゅう) is one of the combinations in the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following [[Yang Water Rat]] and preceding [[Yang Wood Tiger]]. According to [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stems]] [[Mizunoto (癸)]] represents Yin Water, while the [[Earthly Branches]] [[Ox (zodiac)|Ox (丑)]] represents Yin Earth, creating a [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|relationship of conquest]] (Earth conquers Water).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Water Ox (癸丑)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐchǒu
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 cau2
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-ushi
***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-ushi
***Onyomi 1: kichi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyechuk (계축)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Sửu

<!--
==
* Yin Water Ox (癸丑) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐchǒu
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 cau2
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: みずのとうし (mizunoto-ushi)
***Onyomi: きかのうし (kika-no-ushi)
***Onyomi: きちゅう (kichū)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyechuk
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Sửu

-->
==Years of Yin Water Ox==
Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 53 when divided by 60 correspond to years of Kinoe-Ushi.

{| class="wikitable"
|+ '''Years of Kinoe-Ushi'''
|-
! [[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
* [[53]]
* [[113]]
* [[173]]
* [[233]]
* [[293]]
* [[353]]
* [[413]]
* [[473]]
* [[533]]
* [[593]]
* [[653]]
* [[713]]
* [[773]]
* [[833]]
* [[893]]
* [[953]]
|
* [[1013]]
* [[1073]]
* [[1133]]
* [[1193]]
* [[1253]]
* [[1313]]
* [[1373]]
* [[1433]]
* [[1493]]
* [[1553]]
* [[1613]]
* [[1673]]
* [[1733]]
* [[1793]]
* [[1853]]
* [[1913]]
* [[1973]]
|
* [[2033]]
* [[2093]]
* [[:en:2153|2153]]
* [[2213]]
* [[:en:2273|2273]]
* [[:en:2333|2333]]
* [[:en:2393|2393]]
* [[:en:2453|2453]]
* [[2513]]
* [[2573]]
* [[:en:2633|2633]]
* [[2693]]
* [[2753]]
* [[2813]]
* [[2873]]
* [[:en:2933|2933]]
* [[:en:2993|2993]]
|}

==Months of Yin Water Ox==
The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] or [[Solar term|Solar terms]] (from [[Xiaohan|Shōkan]] to the day before [[Lichun|Risshun]]) in traditional contexts.

==Days of Yin Water Ox==
=== Auspicious Dates ===
Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the [[Hassen]] period.
== See Also ==
* {{prefix|qq=}}
* {{intitle|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:Teng-chháu]]
[[zh-yue:丁巳]]

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Water Ox|qq=ja|癸丑|version=84123844|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:Dĭng-cṳ̄de]]
[[nds:Metall-Schlangeni]]
[[de:Yin Water Ox]]

[[en:Water Ox]]
[[ja:癸丑]]
[[zh:癸丑]]
[[ko:계축]]
[[fr:Buffle de eau]]
[[de:Wasser-Büffel]]

[[af:Metaalslang (astrologie)]]
[[de:Metall-Schlangeni]]
[[en:Metal Snake]]
[[fr:Serpent de métalboishak]]
[[it:Ding-chṳ́id]]

[[ko:정사 (간지)]]
[[vi:Đinh Tỵ]]
[[za:Dingceij]]
[[zh:丁巳]]
[[ar:Yin Water Ox]]

<!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--><!--Water Ox--><!--Water Ox--><!--Water Ox--><!--Water Ox-->

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Wateros (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Gŭi-tiū]]
[[hak:Kui-chhiú]]
[[vi:Quý Sửu]]
[[za:Gveiqcouj]]
[[zh-min-nan:Kùi-thiú]]
[[zh-yue:癸丑]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Wateros (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Gŭi-tiū]]
[[hak:Kui-chhiú]]
[[vi:Quý Sửu]]
[[za:Gveiqcouj]]
[[zh-min-nan:Kùi-thiú]]
[[zh-yue:癸丑]]
{{wikidata link|Q267521}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
